canadian_brands.notes: Configured as a known Canadian brand.
Configured as a known Canadian brand.
Configured as a known Canadian brand.

Founded by science and healthcare professionals and manufactured in Toronto, No Pong is a Canadian-owned natural deodorant brand known for its eco-friendly packaging and up to 12 hours of protection. ([madeinca.ca](https://madeinca.ca/deodorant-brands-in-canada/))

Nala has been redefining deodorants since 2018 with luxury, non-toxic formulas made in Vancouver using organic essential oils and botanical ingredients. ([madeinca.ca](https://madeinca.ca/deodorant-brands-in-canada/))

Montreal-based ATTITUDE offers vegan, cruelty-free natural deodorants including plastic-free sticks and baking-soda-free formulas for sensitive skin. ([madeinca.ca](https://madeinca.ca/deodorant-brands-in-canada/))

canadian_brands.top_product: Ocean Bottom Soap Company Natural Deodorant
canadian_brands.notes: Ocean Bottom Soap Company focuses on small-batch, handcrafted deodorants made in Tecumseh using baking soda, magnesium, and essential oils. ([madeinca.ca](https://madeinca.ca/deodorant-brands-in-canada/))
Fresh Essences is a Canadian-owned company in Port Hope producing vegan, cruelty-free deodorants free of aluminum and parabens. ([madeinca.ca](https://madeinca.ca/deodorant-brands-in-canada/))

Toronto-based Lipidology uses grass-fed organic tallow from Ontario farms to create its unscented tallow deodorant supporting the skin’s microbiome. ([madeinca.ca](https://madeinca.ca/deodorant-brands-in-canada/))

Cascadia Skincare, based in Vancouver, crafts eco-friendly botanical deodorants in small batches using mineral powders and essential oils. ([madeinca.ca](https://madeinca.ca/deodorant-brands-in-canada/))

canadian_brands.top_product: Carina Organics Unscented Liquid Crystal Body Deodorant
canadian_brands.notes: Established in the 1970s in North Vancouver, Carina Organics produces certified organic, aluminum-free crystal deodorants. ([madeinca.ca](https://madeinca.ca/deodorant-brands-in-canada/))

Women-led Genesis Tallow in Victoria creates natural deodorants using grass-fed Canadian beef tallow blended with arrowroot and essential oils. ([madeinca.ca](https://madeinca.ca/deodorant-brands-in-canada/))

KIIMA, a Quebec-based company, designs eco-friendly refillable applicators and natural deodorant refills made in Canada. ([lesproduitsduquebec.com](https://lesproduitsduquebec.com/en/participating-companies/kiima?utm_source=openai))

Laboratoires Druide in Pointe-Claire has been a pioneer of natural and organic body care since 1979, manufacturing its ECOCERT-certified deodorants in Montreal. ([cosmebio.org](https://www.cosmebio.org/en/cosmebio-label/brands-carrying-cosmebio-label/laboratoires-druide-inc/druide-2093/?utm_source=openai))

canadian_brands.top_product: Green Beaver Natural Aluminum-Free Antiperspirant – Fresh Verve
canadian_brands.notes: Founded in 2002 and headquartered in Hawkesbury, Green Beaver offers clinically proven, aluminum-free antiperspirants made with its NaturaDri™ technology. ([findcanadianproducts.ca](https://findcanadianproducts.ca/canadian-deodorants/))

canadian_brands.top_product: Purelygreat For men and women, Unscented Deodorant
canadian_brands.notes: PurelyGreat Inc., founded in 2011 in Toronto and now based in Peterborough, specializes in EWG-verified, vegan cream deodorants. ([crunchbase.com](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/purelygreat?utm_source=openai))

canadian_brands.top_product: The Unscented Company Deodorant in Recycled Oval Cardboard Tube
canadian_brands.notes: Headquartered in Montreal, The Unscented Company produces fragrance-free deodorants packaged in recycled cardboard tubes. ([findcanadianproducts.ca](https://findcanadianproducts.ca/canadian-deodorants/))

canadian_brands.top_product: Rocky Mountain Soap Company Lemongrass Natural Deodorant Roll-on
canadian_brands.notes: Based and manufactured in Canmore, Rocky Mountain Soap Company offers a variety of roll-on deodorants including Lemongrass and Tea Tree. ([findcanadianproducts.ca](https://findcanadianproducts.ca/canadian-deodorants/))
